label: 1540 CE
era_summary: Year 1540 (MDXL) was a leap year starting on Thursday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1540: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563; Pope-Papal States, Camerino, 1540-45. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1540: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563; Spain (Ghent), 1539-40; Spain-Mexico (northern), 1540-42. Maddison records GDP/capita 1458 (ESP, 1540) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
